extraction.one_line_summary: FULL-SANG Jakob attacked 9.6km from summit of Alto de la Cubilla, dropped KNOX and GHEBREIGZABHIER in final 2km for solo victory.
tactical_patterns: LOPEZ Miguel attacked inside final 4km from GC group, forcing ROGLIC/POGACAR to bridge while VALVERDE cracked on final slopes losing 23s.
Deceuninck positioned KNOX 18min down on GC to infiltrate breakaway on long climb, forcing Movistar to control behind.
FULL-SANG attacked with 9.6km remaining on 18km climb, exploiting fact that shorter distance deterred immediate chase from co-breakaway riders.
BOUCHARD took maximum KOM points twice deliberately while MADRAZO struggled, revealing jersey can be won tactically from breaks on medium mountains.

rider_signals.FULL-SANG Jakob: positive: Won from 9.6km solo attack on 18km climb after working for LOPEZ all race, showing hidden form reserve
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel: positive: Attack inside 4km forced ROGLIC to chase and dropped VALVERDE, signaling recovery from earlier weakness
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: Lost 23s on final slopes after LOPEZ attack, unable to match accelerations despite teammate SOLER pacing
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Responded immediately to LOPEZ attack and extended GC lead without teammate support in final kilometers
rider_signals.KNOX James: positive: Infiltrated strong break 18min down on GC, finished 4th showing Deceuninck willing to sacrifice GC for stage hunting
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Had another bad day and dropped to 6th overall,Pattern of weakness continuing in third week
rider_signals.MADRAZO Angel: negative: Struggled on both Cat-1 climbs taking only second place points, vulnerable to aggressive KOM hunting from breaks
